job.title: BI Talend / PowerBI Consultant
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our Data practice in Marseille as a BI Consultant. You design and deploy Business Intelligence solutions using Talend and Power BI for major enterprise clients.
mission.1: Concevoir et développer des pipelines ETL avec Talend
mission.2: Créer des rapports et tableaux de bord Power BI
mission.4: Analyse business needs and write specifications
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in informatique ou statistiques
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience in BI et ETL
profile.3: Proficiency in Talend (Open Studio ou Enterprise)
profile.4: Bonne pratique de Power BI / DAX
profile.5: Knowledge of bases SQL et modélisation dimensionnelle
